step.name: fix-requirements
step.action: Lock app type (dashboard / marketing / SaaS), style direction (calm / dense / playful), framework (React / Vue / Svelte).

step.name: generate-3-to-5-distinct-variants
step.action: Produce 3-5 designs differing in navigation pattern (sidebar / topbar / hybrid) AND information density (compact / comfortable / spacious).

step.name: render-screenshots
step.action: Render each variant at target viewport with realistic content. Place screenshots side by side.
step.decision-gate: If a variant fails to render or breaks responsive, fix or drop before the selection step.

step.name: select-by-taste
step.action: Stakeholder review meeting or single-decider pick. Decision logged with rationale.

step.name: define-tokens-from-variant
step.action: Extract colour, spacing, type, radius, shadow values. Author primitive + semantic token tiers.

step.name: scaffold-storybook
step.action: Install Storybook with pinned versions. Configure addons (a11y, viewport, controls). Add a first component (Button) colocated with story + test.
